testcase.name: test_batch_stamp_single_file
testcase.failure: tests/test_batch_stamping.py:119: in test_batch_stamp_single_file assert response.status_code == 200, f"Batch stamp failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Batch stamp failed: {"detail":"CSRF token missing","error_code":"CSRF_MISSING"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_batch_stamping.py:156: in test_batch_stamp_multiple_files assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_batch_stamping.py:252: in test_batch_stamp_csv_has_correct_fields assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_batch_stamp_different_anchors
testcase.failure: tests/test_batch_stamping.py:309: in test_batch_stamp_different_anchors assert response.status_code == 200, f"Anchor {anchor} failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Anchor bottom_right failed: {"detail":"CSRF token missing","error_code":"CSRF_MISSING"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_batch_stamping.py:338: in test_batch_stamp_page_mode_all assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_batch_stamp_reject_non_pdf
testcase.failure: tests/test_batch_stamping.py:370: in test_batch_stamp_reject_non_pdf assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 403 == 400 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_batch_stamp_no_files
testcase.failure: tests/test_batch_stamping.py:396: in test_batch_stamp_no_files assert response.status_code in [400, 422] E assert 403 in [400, 422] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
